data.title: QVC Group to Significantly Strengthen Financial Position as Company Continues Advancing Transformational Live Social Shopping Growth Strategy
data.description: Signed a restructuring support agreement with the majority of lenders to significantly decrease debt, an essential component of the WIN growth strategy. The company has commenced a voluntary prepackaged court-supervised process in the U.S. to execute a financial restructuring plan, excluding international operations. This move aims to address the debt burden and facilitate a turnaround.

data.title: University of Phoenix leaders spotlight learning-to-workforce alignment and culture as strategy at UPCEA 2026 Annual Conference
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Dr. Marc Booker and Bridget Beville discussed strategies for institutional agility, workforce pathways, and federal policy readiness. McCeil Johnson was announced as serving in UPCEA leadership. The University of Phoenix made this announcement with Dr. Booker, Ph.D., as the vice president.

data.title: Money News Network Partners With Entrepreneur to Scale in Business Podcasting
data.description: The latest partnership between Money News Network (MNN) and Entrepreneur, a renowned business entity, has been confirmed, solidifying MNN's prominence in financial media. On April 16, 2026, the podcast-centric MNN disclosed this collaboration, enhancing its influence in the sector. This collaboration will see Entrepreneur's key shows joining MNN's lineup, propelling their joint reach and impact in the realm of business and finance content.

data.title: JATT II Acquisition Corp Announces Pricing of $60,000,000 Initial Public Offering
data.description: On April 16, 2026, in Westfield, N.J., JATT II Acquisition Corp revealed the pricing for its initial public offering of 6,000,000 ordinary shares at $10.00 per share. This special purpose acquisition company is set up as a Cayman Islands exempted entity. The ordinary shares are anticipated to be listed on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol “JATT” starting from April 17, 2026. The closing of this offering is scheduled for April 20, 2026, pending standard closing requirements.

data.title: COTY Stockholders Have Rights - If You Lost Money Investing in Coty Inc. Contact Robbins LLP for Information About Recovering Your Losses
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Robbins LLP issued a reminder regarding a class action lawsuit filed for investors who bought or acquired Coty Inc. (NYSE: COTY) common stock between November 5, 2025, and February 4, 2026. The lawsuit includes all relevant subsidiaries of Coty.

data.title: GEMI Stockholders Have Rights - If You Lost Money Investing in Gemini Space Station, Inc. Contact Robbins LLP for Information About Recovering Your Losses
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Robbins LLP issued a reminder to stockholders about a class action lawsuit filed for investors who bought Gemini Space Station, Inc. (NASDAQ: GEMI) Class A common stock related to the Company's September 12 transactions. The lawsuit pertains to individuals who purchased or acquired stock during that time frame.

data.title: PACSUN PARTNERS WITH HAWAIIAN TROPIC ON A GOLDEN HOUR SUMMER COLLECTION
data.description: The collaboration between Hawaiian Tropic and Pacsun combines the sun-kissed beauty legacy of Hawaiian Tropic with Pacsun's summer fashion expertise. This partnership aims to embody the essence of the upcoming season. The joint venture comes as summer approaches in 2026. This fusion of two renowned brands is set to bring forth a collection that embodies the relaxed, vibrant spirit of summer dressing. Stay tuned to experience the synergy of these two iconic brands as they unveil their collaborative collection, showcasing the perfect blend of sun-kissed beauty and trendy summer styles.

data.title: HelloNation Explains Multi-Point Inspection With Insights From Auto Service Expert Carl Krause
data.description: A recent article in Tucson, Arizona on April 16, 2026, sheds light on the significance of a multi-point vehicle inspection in ensuring safe and reliable driving, particularly in challenging conditions. The article discusses the comprehensive coverage of such inspections and how they contribute to maintaining vehicle performance. It provides valuable insights into the importance of thorough vehicle check-ups to prevent potential issues on the road.

data.title: CenterPoint Energy appoints Michael A. "Casey" Herman to Board of Directors
data.description: A new Director has joined the Board with extensive experience in audit, governance, strategic planning, and long-term financing, particularly within the utility sector. This appointment comes as part of the Board of Directors' continuous renewal efforts. The new Director's decades of expertise bring valuable insights to the Board. The appointment was officially announced on April 16, 2026, in Houston.

data.title: ATRA Stockholders Have Rights - If You Lost Money Investing in Atara Biotherapeutics, Inc. Contact Robbins LLP for Information About Recovering Your Losses
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Robbins LLP issued a reminder to shareholders regarding a class action lawsuit filed for individuals who bought or acquired Atara Biotherapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: ATRA) stocks between May 20, 2024, and January 9, 2026. Atara, a company focused on developing therapies, is the subject of the lawsuit concerning potential securities law violations during the specified period.

data.title: CenterPoint Energy Declares Regular Common Stock Dividend of $0.2300
data.description: On April 16, 2026, CenterPoint Energy, Inc.'s Board of Directors announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.2300 per share for their Common Stock (NYSE: CNP). This dividend will be paid on June 11, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the closing date.

data.title: Best PDF OCR Software with High Accuracy from Tenorshare PDNob
data.description: Recently launched in New York on April 16, 2026, Tenorshare PDNob, acclaimed as the top PDF OCR software of the year, has seen significant enhancements. The latest PDNob 2.0 iteration boasts improved accuracy, a more user-friendly interface, and advanced AI capabilities. This version upgrade positions PDNob as a formidable contender in the market, attracting a growing number of users.

data.title: Entegris to Report Results for First Quarter of 2026 on Thursday, April 30, 2026
data.description: Entegris, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENTG) based in Billerica, Massachusetts, will announce its financial results for Q1 of 2026 on April 30, 2026, before the market opens. A teleconference with company management will take place on the same day at 8:00am ET. To participate, individuals can dial +1 833-316-1983 or +1 785-838-9310 and provide the Conference ID: ENTGQ126. It is advised to dial in 5 to 10 minutes before the call begins. The event will also be live-streamed, with a replay available later.

data.title: QuasarEdge Acquisition Corporation Announces Closing of $100 Million Initial Public Offering
data.description: On April 16, 2026, QuasarEdge Acquisition Corp. (NYSE: QREDU) disclosed the successful conclusion of its IPO, issuing 10,000,000 units priced at $10.00 each. The underwriters hold a 45-day option post-prospectus to buy up to 1,500,000 additional units at the IPO rate for potential over-allotments.

data.title: HIVE stock falls 11% post $75M raise for AI data centers; plans zero-interest notes offering for GPU expansion amid miner shift to AI infrastructure.
data.description: HIVE Digital is preparing to launch an offering of zero-interest notes in order to support their GPU expansion. This move comes as a response to Bitcoin miners shifting their focus towards AI infrastructure. The company aims to finance this expansion through the offering, indicating a significant shift in their strategy. The miners accelerating this pivot towards AI infrastructure suggests a growing trend in the industry.

data.title: Riot Platforms schedules Q1 2026 earnings call on April 30 amidst AI shift. Stock Strong Buy at $32 target.
data.description: The earnings call for RIOT in Q1 2026 is set for April 30 amidst scrutiny on their Bitcoin mining operations transitioning to AI data centers. The stock is currently rated as a Strong Buy with a target price of $32.
